title: helianthella mexicana
intro: Helianthella mexicana is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae), native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Helianthella mexicana include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with colds, fever, and respiratory issues. Helianthella mexicana can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, and is often combined with other herbs like yarrow and plantain to enhance its medicinal properties.
